rows.label: qev050304_JNK0010
rows.name: Speak

rows.label: qev050304_SEL0011
rows.name: Call out to Ge Jewhe, who is standing frozen in place.

rows.label: qev050304_JNK0020
rows.name: Intervene

rows.label: qev050304_SEL0021
rows.name: Take a battle stance to help Ge Jewhe.

rows.label: qev050304_MSG0001
rows.name:
...Guh...! You're that meddler from
earlier! Did you come to save me?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050304_MSG0002
rows.name:
...Damn it! When I looked at this silver
bracelet again, so many memories with
that girl came flooding back to me...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050304_MSG0003
rows.name:
And I became terrified of dying, terrified!
My legs started shaking, tears welled
up... I couldn't even face that guy![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050304_MSG0004
rows.name:
To lose my nerve at the last possible
moment like this... I am the lowest
of the low as a warrior![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050304_JNK0030
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev050304_SEL0031
rows.name: Laugh at Ge Jewhe's cowardice.

rows.label: qev050304_JNK0040
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev050304_SEL0041
rows.name: Tell her that Ge Jewhe's decision was the right one.

rows.label: qev050304_MSG0005
rows.name:
You can laugh all you want...
That's exactly what I did.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050304_MSG0006
rows.name:
I am a warrior! This is
absolutely not right...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050304_MSG0007
rows.name:
...But please, you have to save me! Looking at the
bracelet reminded me of something crucial. If I die
here, I won't be able to fulfill my promise...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050304_JNK0050
rows.name: Speak

rows.label: qev050304_SEL0051
rows.name: Call out to Ge Jewhe, who is standing frozen in place.

rows.label: qev050304_JNK0060
rows.name: Intervene

rows.label: qev050304_SEL0061
rows.name: Take a battle stance to help Ge Jewhe.
